name: link_design
full_help:
link_design

Description: 
Open a netlist design

Syntax: 
link_design  [-name <arg>] [-part <arg>] [-constrset <arg>] [-top <arg>]
             [-mode <arg>] [-pr_config <arg>] [-reconfig_partitions <args>]
             [-partitions <args>] [-ignore_timing] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
design object

Usage: 
  Name                    Description
  -----------------------------------
  [-name]                 Design name
  [-part]                 Target part
  [-constrset]            Constraint fileset to use
  [-top]                  Specify the top module name when the structural 
                          netlist is Verilog
  [-mode]                 The design mode. Values: default, out_of_context
                          Default: default
  [-pr_config]            PR Configuration to apply while opening the design
  [-reconfig_partitions]  List of reconfigurable partitions to load while 
                          opening the design
  [-partitions]           List of partitions to load while opening the design
  [-ignore_timing]        open a netlist design without the timing 
                          constraints.
  [-quiet]                Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]              Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Tools
